summary: All three requirements are well-implemented in the diff. REQ-8 (rebranding to zakariasadeq7site123) is fully addressed across Navigation, HeroSection, Footer, and index.html. REQ-9 (unblocked games) is implemented with 8 games in the frontend fallback and 6 in the backend. REQ-10 (shows with Breaking Bad and others) is implemented with 9 shows in the frontend fallback and 7+ in the backend. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (migration.mo) was added to the backend with a Migration.run function that resets games and shows arrays to empty arrays.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request any backend migration infrastructure or module. This is extra scaffolding not asked for.

hallucinated_features.description: Additional fallback games beyond the 6 specifically requested (Moto X3M and Subway Surfers) were added to the frontend games list.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specified at least 6 games (Slope, 1v1.LOL, Cookie Clicker, Run 3, Drift Hunters, Retro Bowl). Adding Moto X3M and Subway Surfers was not requested, though it does not conflict with any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Additional fallback shows beyond the 6 requested (Better Call Saul and The Last of Us) were added to the frontend shows list.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request listed specific shows to include but did not request Better Call Saul or The Last of Us. These are extra entries not mentioned in the requirements.
